title: Bash scanner Deserialize panics on short input (fuzz finding)
description: FuzzScannerSerializeRoundTrip found that bash.Scanner.Deserialize panics with index out of range [1] with length 1 at scanner.go:134 when given []byte("0") (single byte 0x30). Needs bounds check before accessing data[1].
close_reason: Fixed Bash+Python scanner Deserialize panics in 033693a. Bounds checks added for short input and uint32 overflow.
